component.name: Anchorage
component.summary: Save and browse your Linkding bookmarks

description.p: Anchorage is a native GTK4/libadwaita client for Linkding, the self-hosted bookmark manager. It is designed mobile-first for GNOME Shell Mobile and adapts cleanly to the desktop.

ul.li: Browse and search your bookmarks, including tag and status filters
Add bookmarks by URL with automatic title, description and tag suggestions
Edit, archive, unarchive and delete bookmarks
Credentials stored securely via the Secret Service

description.p: Initial release: connect, browse, search, add, edit, archive and delete.
